title: Orchiodes decipiens

intro: Orchiodes decipiens, also known as Himalayan orchid, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Liliaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions, with reported benefits including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The bioactive constituents of Orchiodes decipiens include iridoid glycosides, phenolic compounds, and flavonoids, which are believed to contribute to its medicinal properties.
